*highlighted section*  
produce a polynomial nutritional profile represented by $ P(x) = 4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7 $, where $ x $ represents a variable tied to portion size in grams. produce the definite integral of $ P(x) $ from $ x = 0 $ to $ x = 10 $, representing the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna.  

*highlighted section*  
produce a trigonometric function $ Q(t) = 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $, where $ t $ represents time in hours after consumption, highlighting the time-dependent energy release. produce the Fourier series representation of $ Q(t) $ up to the second harmonic, assuming $ Q(t) $ is periodic with period $ 2\pi $.  

*highlighted section*  
produce the Fourier series representation of $ Q(t) $ up to the second harmonic, assuming $ Q(t) $ is periodic with period $ 2\pi $. produce the Fourier series representation of $ Q(t) $ up to the second harmonic, assuming $ Q(t) $ is periodic with period $ 2\pi $.
